jobs.title: Account Manager
jobs.content: <div class="content-intro"><p><strong>About Playlist</strong></p><p>At Playlist, life's rich. ClassPass is the global leader in subscription-fitness aggregation, partnering with 30,000+ fitness studios and gyms to bring boutique fitness, wellness experiences, and recovery services to consumers worldwide. The Sales team partners with the largest enterprise wellness buyers across the United States to ship account growth on the ClassPass Corporate & Enterprise surfaces.</p></div><p>You'll prospect, qualify, and develop the top-of-funnel pipeline for the ClassPass Corporate & Enterprise book of business across North America.</p>

jobs.title: Director, Product Management, ClassPass Consumer
jobs.content: <h2><strong>Director, Product Management, ClassPass Consumer</strong></h2><p>At ClassPass, we make wellness accessible. Our mission is to create the most personalised fitness and wellness experiences on earth. The Consumer team partners with the largest fitness-studio operators across the United States to ship discovery, booking, and retention on the ClassPass Marketplace.</p><p>You'll lead the Consumer Product Management team for the ClassPass mobile and web surfaces across North America.</p>
